subject: I made a website preview for The Cutting Edge Salon
body:
Hi,

I came across The Cutting Edge Salon in Cornwall and noticed you don't have a website yet. I went ahead and designed a quick 1-page preview concept for your salon business — with a hero section, services list, and contact form.

It's not live anywhere, just a concept to show what's possible. Want to see it?

— Mehdi
